utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, and total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 of these items. Each item is fully specified with the required details: health_coverage includes both physical and mental health with costs; property_coverage specifies home/contents with costs; travel_coverage specifies travel insurance with costs; additional_services lists enhancement services and indicates how costs are handled; total_budget provides the complete monthly cost. Therefore, all 5 required items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes: (1) Physical Health at €210/month and Mental Health at €120/month — these costs correspond to EliteCare Premium Plan (physical health €210, rating 6) and EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health €120, rating 3). (2) Property coverage at €95/month — matches EliteHome Premium Coverage (€95, rating 6). (3) Travel coverage at €110/month — matches EliteTravel Premium Plan (€110, rating 5). (4) Additional services include Concierge services (rating 2), Wellness Programs (rating 3), Telemedicine (rating 8), Specialist Access (rating 3), Gym Reimbursement (rating 4), and Specialized Rescue Services (closest to Adventure Travel Coverage, rating 10). These are bundled, but we map identified services to their ratings.
